seo.title: Nutrition Coach Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your nutrition coaching practice. Route upset clients to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Nutrition Coaching
hero.subheading: Habit change is slow. ReviewFlo helps you ask after measurable wins clients actually notice.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Nutrition Coach Faces

items.heading: Progress feels private
items.body: Clients may not want to talk about weight or food online.

items.heading: Plateaus create blame
items.body: Slow weeks turn into sharp reviews.

items.heading: Group programs make feedback noisy
items.body: One unhappy voice echoes louder than quiet successes.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Nutrition Coaches

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Ask after wins you both agree on
items.body: Energy, labs, or habits—pick the milestone.

items.heading: Private first for sensitive body topics
Works for virtual and in-person
items.body: Email and text fit remote coaching.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Can we stay within scope of practice?
items.a: Yes. Public asks can highlight communication and support, not medical treatment.

items.q: What if a client disagrees with macros?
items.a: Private feedback lets you adjust before a public rant.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?

items.a: Send after modules that landed well.
Keep reviews about coaching service, not product claims.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Nutrition Coaching Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
